ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle for the team */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's logo and uniform */,
  "secondary_color" TEXT /* Secondary color of the team's logo and uniform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle for the league */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the season belongs to */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 1926-27) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_start" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoff_start" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_season_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's season record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the regular season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the regular season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties in the regular season */,
  "overtime_losses" INTEGER /* Number of overtime losses in the regular season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned in the regular season */,
  "finishing_position" INTEGER /* Finishing position in the league standings */,
  "points_percentage" REAL /* Points percentage in the regular season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the regular season */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals scored against the team */,
  "power_play_opportunities" INTEGER /* Number of power play opportunities */,
  "penalty_kill_opportunities" INTEGER /* Number of penalty kill opportunities */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* Number of shutouts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_records_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_records" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's playoff record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_overtime_losses" INTEGER /* Number of overtime losses in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_note" TEXT /* Special notes (e.g., Stanley Cup Champions) */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the playoffs */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals scored against the team in the playoffs */,
  "power_play_opportunities" INTEGER /* Number of power play opportunities in the playoffs */,
  "penalty_kill_opportunities" INTEGER /* Number of penalty kill opportunities in the playoffs */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* Number of shutouts in the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_records_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's performance metric */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "goal_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals scored against the team */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals scored */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total number of penalties */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff wins */,
  "faceoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff losses */,
  "shots_for" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the team */,
  "shots_against" INTEGER /* Total shots taken against the team */,
  "save_percentage" REAL /* Save percentage of the team's goalies */,
  "goals_saved_above_average" REAL /* Goals saved above average by the team's goalies */,
  "shooting_percentage" REAL /* Shooting percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_metrics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Summary of the coach's record */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards or honors received by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defense) */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total number of penalties */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Player's weight */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the player was injured */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave the rating */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team (optional) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player (optional) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment associated with the rating */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., overall, performance, potential) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., fan, expert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address for shipping or contact */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed (optional) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed (optional) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user for security and tracking */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
